commonIssues:
Registration offices may decline documents presented late in the day due to high workload.

How to fix:

  • Book slots in advance via the IGRS AP Portal and visit early in the morning.

Difficulties providing precise property descriptions based on AP government surveys.

How to fix:

  • Always use official Revenue Records (Adangal/1B) for survey numbers and boundaries. Use professional drafting assistance.

Problems with independent witness requirements and allegations of coercion.

How to fix:

  • Bring two independent witnesses (not beneficiaries) with valid Aadhaar IDs. Ensure they see the testator sign the document.

As per High Court rulings, registration doesn't automatically make a Will valid; it must be proven per the Evidence Act.

How to fix:

  • Maintain additional proofs of execution, like video recordings, and inform witnesses that they may need to testify in court if disputed.

Altering a registered Will is a complex, formal process.

How to fix:

  • Create a registered "Codicil" (amendment) or execute a completely new registered Will explicitly revoking the previous one.
